channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 12 inch potholes, 16th March
item.description:
They have been there for over six months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. George's Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle o/s 14- 16 Ambleside Road, 16th March
item.description:
A vehicle has been abandoned for almost 6 months now. It is taxed until June 2026. No MOT since 11 Feb 2026
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Ambleside Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic bag stuck on the tree, 16th March
item.description:
There is a plastic bag stuck on the tree in front of Hello Vet on chatsworth road. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooksbys Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bin, 16th March
item.description:
This bin is overflowing with dog bags. Please can you empty it asap. Many thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle o/s 12 - 14 Ambleside Road, 16th March
item.description:
An abandoned vehicle has been there for over 6 months and the tyres are flat.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Ambleside Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 16th March
item.description:
Wood, mattress and lots of other furniture dumped behind 113 cotmandene crescent behind back of Greggs JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on pavement, 16th March
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish on the pavement by the white wall.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orchard Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motorbike on LBB land, 16th March
item.description:
Abandoned motorbike on LBB land. Please can this be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Tovil Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign and pavement damaged, 16th March
item.description:
Damage of road sign and pavement has been there for over two months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rosewell Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dismantled cupboard dumped on street., 16th March
item.description:
Been here for a week at least, outside 45 Cricketfield Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricketfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle in dangerous condition., 16th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked outside my house for several days. It has serious and dangerous body damage. In addition to the vehicle being a danger to the public, some may consider it may be connected to myself, which it is not

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Riverdale Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 16th March
item.description:
Body of dead fox on grass verge outside Brooklyn Cottage, Sydenham Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Rubbish., 16th March
item.description:
A pink table and waste timber timber have been dumped along St Martins close, along the boundry of 9 Augustine Road. These items have been present for the past few months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Martins Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 16th March
item.description:
Dead fox opposite 3 sydenham avenue JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Mews, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood pallets left on grass verge, 16th March
item.description:
On Aldersmead Road near the entrance to Cator Park . Wooden pallets left on the grass verge .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overspilling bin at 38 all over pavement, 16th March
item.description:
Please could this be addressed? bin at 38 has been overflowing and now there is food and litter strewn over the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Matthias Road, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping by residents, 16th March
item.description:
This is totally unacceptable behaviour by people who care little for their environment. Also the elder bush beads cutting back as it will soon block the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All dumped overnight. This is now happening every night, 16th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter 157 Amhurst Road dumped boxes and polystyrene in recycle bags., 16th March
item.description:
Excessive Litter 157 Amhurst Road dumped boxes and polystyrene in recycle bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge graffiti on the wall, 16th March
item.description:
This graffiti has been here for a while now. Please can it be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
